title: Audit and harden IPv6Packet ingress for upper-layer (ICMPv6/UDP) malformed sources
description: In IPv6Packet.from_bytes, router.route, node receive paths: explicitly validate source address (drop multicast sources, unspecified sources per RFCs for upper layers). Ensure exceptions from parsing lead to drop not propagation. Add metrics for dropped malformed packets. Align with parent recovery criteria.
